_comment: Reference-only Firestore composite-index spec for the /api/leads dedupe query. NOT deployed from this repo's firebase.json (which is scoped to functions only) to avoid clobbering snapbid's console-managed indexes. Create via: (a) Firebase Console → Firestore → Indexes → Create, (b) click the auto-generated link Firestore emits in the /api/leads error log on the first production query, or (c) firebase deploy --only firestore:indexes --config path/to/separate/config.json.
